params_used.custom_text: // Asynchronous 4-bit down counter that decrements on the falling edge of the input clock signal (div_clk) when the 'contando' signal is high. The counter resets to zero when the 'rst' signal is asserted. It compares its value to the specified 'time_value'; when the counter reaches this value, it resets to zero and asserts the 'terminado' output signal to indicate completion. If 'contando' is low, the 'terminado' output remains deasserted, regardless of the counter's value.
